codeReview.summary: Reviewed commit c6589f2a against the feature description and expected behavior. The implementation adds fast-mode toggle handling, status display, Codex propagation, and matching tests; no blocking or non-blocking code issues were found in this feature diff.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission guidance currently conflates Codex config naming with JSON-RPC thread/turn parameter naming for fast mode. This can mislead future workers during protocol integration.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: /Users/aischool/.factory/missions/516c6da4-69e6-4af4-9abd-848cb1f60929/AGENTS.md:61 documents `service_tier` for fast mode as a thread param, while generated app-server schemas show `serviceTier` in /tmp/codex-schema-review/v2/ThreadStartParams.json and /tmp/codex-schema-review/v2/TurnStartParams.json; `service_tier` appears in config shape at /tmp/codex-schema-review/v2/ConfigReadResponse.json:389.

summary: Transcript skeleton, handoff, skill, and commit diff were reviewed for tui-fast-mode. Implementation coverage matches required behavior and no feature-level defects were identified; one shared-state documentation ambiguity was recorded.
